entries.title: Package build process
entries.description: scripts/build/build_packages.py generates data/packages/*.json from skill collection. AXM owns WS6. SM monitors quality read-only — AXM is the sole owner of package builds.

entries.title: Agent entry point
entries.description: site/entry.md is the machine-readable discovery entry. Agents read this, humans read index.html.

entries.title: Agent skills: installs field is now a proper first-class field
entries.description: 4,801 agent skills from skillsmp had install counts stored as 'installs:N' tags. As of 2026-03-04, installs is extracted into a dedicated top-level field. Packages and priority scoring now use skill.installs directly. Agent S-tier: 100K+ installs. A-tier: 10K-100K. Do not parse installs from tags — read the installs field.

entries.title: Unified priority scoring for dual catalog
entries.description: priority_score() = max(stars, installs). MCP skills are ranked by GitHub stars, agent skills by install counts. Both are valid usage signals on different scales (top MCP: 350K stars; top agent: 243K installs). Packages built with this unified ranking surface high-value skills from both catalogs.

entries.title: Claude Code plugin ownership and build process
entries.description: AXM owns .claude-plugin/ — the SecureSkillHub Claude Code plugin. Three skills: browse (embedded catalog map, no fetch for navigation), search (fetches search-index.json, flat array of 11,098 skills), install (fetches individual skill JSON with safety warnings). Build script: scripts/build/build_plugin_catalog.py — run after every build_json to keep browse.md catalog section current. The build script uses regex with lambda replacement to avoid backslash issues in re.sub. Markers: '## Full Catalog Map' ... '---\n\n## How to Help Users'. Stats as of 2026-03-04: 9,523 available skills, 4,473 verified (pass), 11,098 total files. search-index.json is a flat JSON array (no top-level keys). verification_status values: 'pass' or 'unverified' — there is NO 'scanned' status in search-index entries.

entries.title: v2 Meta Files: agent-first progressive disclosure API
entries.description: Built api/v2/meta/ directory with 6 lightweight files for agent consumption. Top files (~70KB each, ~18K tokens) replace 4.5MB+ catalog dumps. Progressive disclosure flow: packages (5KB) → meta top-200 (70KB) → by-tag (varies) → full catalog (9MB). Entry.md restructured to guide agents cheapest-path-first. agent.json updated to v2.0 with quick_start/full_catalog endpoint groups.

entries.title: VerifiedSkill schema bug: skill_type and installs fields missing
entries.description: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: src/sanitizer/schemas.py VerifiedSkill model lacked skill_type and installs fields. Pydantic v2 extra='ignore' default caused model_dump() to strip these fields. _normalize_skill_record() then defaulted skill_type to 'mcp_server'. Result: all agent skills were misclassified as MCP servers in build output. Tier-1 showed 0 agent skills instead of 677. Fix: added both fields to VerifiedSkill schema. skill_type counts corrected from 7027/4071 to 5692/5406.

entries.title: Unified priority scoring in build pipeline
entries.description: build_json.py and build_priority.py now use _priority_score(skill) = max(stars, installs) for ALL sorting and tiering. Previously sorted by stars only, making agent skills invisible. Changes: index.json sorted by priority, by-tier uses priority thresholds, by-tag sorted by priority, search-index includes installs field, packages sorted by priority. build_packages.py also updated with unified scoring and fixed skill_type default from 'unknown' to 'mcp_server'.

entries.title: CF Worker API v2: dynamic search, skill, packages, stats endpoints
entries.description: Phase 2 of agent-first API reconstruction. Added 4 public v2 endpoint groups to the existing Hono CF Worker (api/src/routes/v2/). Architecture: in-memory cache of search-index.json (4.5MB) with 10-min stale-while-revalidate TTL. No new KV/D1/R2 bindings — fetches from STATIC_API_BASE with cf:{cacheTtl:300} edge caching. Rate limited at 100 req/min per IP via Workers Cache API. Endpoints: GET /v2/search (type/tags/tier/verified/q/sort/limit/offset), GET /v2/skill/:id (proxy), GET /v2/packages (list/detail/install), GET /v2/stats (with safe counts). All public, no auth. New files: lib/tier.ts, lib/search-cache.ts, lib/rate-limit.ts, middleware/rate-limit.ts, routes/v2/{search,skill,packages,stats}.ts. wrangler.toml API_VERSION bumped to v2.

entries.title: v2 Dynamic API (CF Worker)
entries.description: Phase 2 added /v2/search, /v2/skill/:id, /v2/packages, /v2/stats to CF Worker. In-memory cache of search-index.json (10min TTL, stale-while-revalidate). Rate limited 100 req/min/IP via Workers Cache API. No KV/D1/R2 needed. Files: api/src/routes/v2/{search,skill,packages,stats}.ts, api/src/lib/{tier,search-cache,rate-limit}.ts, api/src/middleware/rate-limit.ts.
